lyric: So let's just pretend everything and anything between you and me was never meant.
I'm never alone, I'm alone all the time.
Are we already the people we're going to be?
We're all writing letters we'll never send.
Do you feel as hollow as I feel?
I keep asking myself, 'What would you do if you were me?'
How do I stop feeling sorry for myself?
song: I've Been So Lost for So Long

lyric: Somewhere between the time I'm awake and the time I'm asleep.
song: But the Regrets Are Killing Me

lyric: I'll see you when we're both not so emotional.
song: I'll See You When We're Both Not So Emotional

lyric: Everything means everything, or nothing at all.
I swear this will be the last time I'll ever ask myself why.
song: I've Been So Lost for So Long
